summary: Mixed macro: PPI hot (6% YoY), rate cuts killed, but Trump-Xi summit (Day 1 today) could be positive catalyst. XAG trending-up but signals noisy (49.7% 1d consensus). BTC consolidating at $80K with marginal 53% edge. Oil steady $102-107 with Iran ceasefire fragile. Overnight: disabled 2 harmful signals (funding 30.8%, macro_regime 47% with 29K samples). System showed correct restraint yesterday (28 invocations, 0 trades).

trade_ideas.rationale: Trending-up regime. $120 target prophecy intact (0.8 conviction). All checkpoints through $80 triggered. 3d consensus accuracy 57.4% supports medium-term thesis. Short-term (1d) noisy at 49.7% — wait for clear signal.

RSI 30.5 oversold. Inverse H&S targeting $84K. Post-halving cycle historically bullish. $75K checkpoint triggered. On-chain signal 60% accuracy. But trending-down regime = caution. Wait for $81K confirmation.

system_improvements_proposed: IMPLEMENTED: Disabled funding signal (30.8% accuracy) — was polluting consensus with wrong BUY calls
IMPLEMENTED: Disabled macro_regime signal (47%, 29K samples, BUY acc 41.3%) — biggest XAG noise source
VERIFIED: news_event BUY directional gate working correctly (20.5% < 40% threshold)
DEFERRED: IC-weighted voting already implemented. Per-ticker gating already at 45%.
DEFERRED: Phantom voter problem, regime-adaptive signal subsets, horizon-optimized weights
risk_warnings: Trump-Xi summit headlines could whipsaw markets — any Iran mediation news or tariff surprise
PPI at 6% — rate cuts priced out. Rising rates = headwind for gold/crypto
India raised gold/silver import tariffs to 15% from 6% — demand dampener
Iran ceasefire 'on massive life support' — Strait of Hormuz disruption risk
Avanza session expired (May 12) — needs manual BankID login for warrant trading
12 signals dropped >15pp accuracy (May 13 critical error) — accuracy degradation accelerating
research_highlights: IC-weighted signal voting via Max IR approach (already implemented in our system)
Regime-aware LightGBM + HMM won IIT KGP Quant Games 2026 (Sharpe 2.276)
MVRV Z-Score identifies BTC cycle peaks within 2 weeks — our on-chain at 60% but only 45 samples
GRU outperforms LSTM for sub-3yr silver prediction — potential Chronos-2 replacement
Multi-agent LLM debate (TradingAgents framework) improves Sharpe but adds latency
Key finding: many 'enabled' signals are phantom voters (HOLD 100%) on XAG, diluting real consensus
